tasks.title: Create CODEOWNERS file
tasks.body: Create .github/CODEOWNERS mapping the entire repository to @dorkusprime for automatic review assignment on PRs. The file should use a wildcard rule '* @dorkusprime' as the baseline, since the sole maintainer owns all packages. Place the file at .github/CODEOWNERS (GitHub's preferred location when a .github directory already exists).

tasks.title: Audit
tasks.description: Verify all work in CODEOWNERS is complete and correct

breadcrumbs.text: Audit reviewed 1 file (.github/CODEOWNERS, 2 lines). PASS. The file uses correct GitHub CODEOWNERS syntax with a wildcard rule assigning @dorkusprime as owner of all files. Placed in .github/ as GitHub requires. Build and full test suite pass. No findings, no escalations. Quality: clean, minimal, correct.

audit.result_summary: Added .github/CODEOWNERS with a single wildcard rule assigning @dorkusprime as default reviewer for all files. This enables automatic PR review requests from GitHub. Audit confirmed correct syntax, proper file placement, and no impact on build or tests.

task-0001.objective: Create a CODEOWNERS file for automatic PR review assignment
task-0001.what_happened: Created .github/CODEOWNERS with a single wildcard rule assigning @dorkusprime as owner of all files.
action_items: If additional maintainers join, add per-package ownership rules
